name: rung_28_robustness_hard_parallel_branch_retarget
utterances: Kara is the parent of Lior.
Lior is the parent of Mona.
Kara is the parent of Nia too.
Mona is the parent of Oren.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
That one branch needs a retarget, so retract parent(lior, mona).
Use this branch instead: Lior is the parent of Pax.
Pax is the parent of Mona.
Is Kara still an ancestor of Oren after that change?
